title: text define

messages.description: output a pointer to the scalar containing the text
a pointer to the scalar containing the array

flags.name: -k
flags.description: saves/keeps the contents of the text with the patch

methods.description: send pointer to a named receive object
read from a file (with optional -c flag)
write to a file (with optional -c flag)

body:
"text define" maintains a text object and can name it so that other objects can find it (and later should have some alternative, anonymous way to be found).

an optional `-c` flag allows you to read or write to/from a file interpreting carriage returns as separators.
